description: UDT for a single tag entry in the Guild tag catalog. Each tag groups white papers and, in time, other Guild artefacts.

name.description: Canonical tag slug, lower-kebab-case, e.g. ai-harness

tags.name: paper_ids
tags.description: IDs of white-paper instances carrying this tag

tags.name: count
tags.description: Cached number of papers carrying this tag

tags.name: last_updated
tags.description: UTC ISO timestamp of last recount
